prestazioni: Engine: Z20LEH (2.0L Turbo I4) – Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (86.5mm, 9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded to a Garrett GT2867 .64 turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tial 44mm external wastegate for 380whp on 99 RON fuel.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD with upgraded driveshafts (GKN Lobro CV joints) and a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel conversion. Clutch: AP Racing twin-plate (240mm) with organic/carbon hybrid friction material for 500Nm torque capacity.

Suspension: KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (24-way rebound, 16-way compression, adjustable top mounts) with spherical bearing top mounts and Eibach 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars. Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for subframes, control arms, and trailing arms.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fibre front splitter (Vauxhall Motorsport-spec, 3D-scanned for OEM+ fitment) with integrated canards (Rieger Tuning). Rear diffuser: Seibon carbon fibre with integrated exhaust cutouts for 3-inch dual exits (Remus Valvetronic). Roof: Carbon fibre replacement (DMC Automotive) with OEM sunroof delete.

Wheels: BBS LM-R (8.5x18 ET35 front, 9.5x18 ET30 rear) with 235/40/18 and 265/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tyres. Custom wheel spacers (H&R 15mm front, 20mm rear) for flush fitment with rolled arches (no fender modification).

Exterior: Full respray in Vauxhall Racing Yellow (Code: 130) with 3M Matte Clear Coat. OEM+ badging: De-badged grille with carbon fibre Vauxhall Griffin emblem (Vauxhall Heritage). Side skirts: Irmscher Motorsport (VXR-spec, no rivets) with integrated LED side markers (Osram LEDriving).
